headline: Archer Daniels Midland (ADM) On Higher Guidance And Q2 Hopes Looks Fully Valued
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) is back in focus after stronger-than-expected Q1 2026 results and a higher full-year adjusted EPS outlook, with investors now watching closely ahead of the upcoming second-quarter earnings release. See our latest analysis for Archer-Daniels-Midland. At a share price of $82.04, Archer-Daniels-Midland has seen a 90 day share price return of 19.17% and a year to date share price return of 38.93%. headline: ADM to Release Second Quarter Financial Results on August 4, 2026
summary: CHICAGO, July 14, 2026--ADM (NYSE: ADM) today announced that ADM management will host an audio webcast on Tuesday, August 4, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. Central Time to discuss financial results for its second quarter of 2026 and provide a company update. Prior to the call, ADM will issue a press release and related presentation, which will be made available at ADM - Investor Relations.

headline: The Hidden Winners Inside SCHD - July 2026
summary: SCHD has returned just under 2% in the past month, outperforming the S&P 500 ETF SPY by almost 100 bps. Read more on SCHD's holdings here.

headline: Here's What to Expect From Archer-Daniels-Midland's Next Earnings Report
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland is poised to announce its second-quarter results soon, and analysts predict a double-digit increase in the company’s bottom-line figure.
